svg.aria-label: Disposition of every act-of-God mention by decade, NY and IL. Each tile is one court opinion. Gold = defense succeeded; coral = failed; pale indigo ring = mere mention, never adjudicated.
svg.text: every mention of the defense, by decade
Each tile is one opinion. 269 mentions total · 85 decided · 184 never reached.
Most of the time, the court mentions the defense and never decides it.
NY: 78 of 117 mentions never reached (67%). IL: 106 of 152 (70%). The decided ledger is the thin gold-and-coral stripe at the baseline.
